expect: Maintenance-urgency modifier (S465) increased meta dispatch frequency from baseline. Predict meta appeared in top-3 dispatch >=60% of S466-S471 (vs <30% baseline). Falsified if <40%.
actual: Meta dispatch share: 22% pre-modifier (S455-S465, 4/18 lanes) -> 36% post-modifier (S466-S471, 4/11 lanes). 60% of post-modifier sessions opened meta lanes. UCB1 rank: meta #2 (5.1) without modifier -> #1 (7.3) with 4 DUE items (+2.0 cap boost). Meta in top-3: 100% both periods (high exploit=4.856). Modifier provides marginal rank promotion (#2->#1), not category change.
diff: Predicted >=60% top-3 presence: CONFIRMED (100%). Share increase 22%->36%: +64% relative. Nuance: meta was already top-3 without modifier — effect is rank promotion not top-3 entry. Behavioral effect real: 3/5 sessions opened meta lanes.
method: Lane counting from SWARM-LANES.md + UCB1 score decomposition from dispatch_scoring.py
self_apply: This measurement validates the dispatch mechanism. Measuring dispatch effect IS itself dispatched by maintenance urgency — meta is #1 because of DUE enforcement-audit item. Self-referential confirmation.
falsification_criterion: Falsified if meta share drops below 25% over next 10 sessions despite persistent DUE items
